name: Sim: Update safety complaint - investigation complete, report issued
description: Updating Emma Brown's escalated safety complaint on ZA707: crew behaviour safety concern investigated and resolved.
new_notes: Safety concern reviewed by cabin crew standards team. Crew member debriefed and additional training scheduled. Formal written response sent to passenger on March 10 2026 with investigation findings. Passenger compensation: 15000 Lunar Air miles and a $150 travel voucher issued. Case closed following passenger acknowledgement.
